posts.author: LMM (Lisa Miley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone have a solution or suggestion for an app plug-in to fix what Monday took away?

We used dependencies in subitems to create a “cascade” for our production deadlines. So if we shifted 1 date, all the dates below would also shift accordingly.

Monday took away dependencies for subitems. So this completely breaks our workflow, and I haven’t been able to figure out a workaround yet. I’ve installed “subitem automation” from marketplace, but it doesn’t have the recipe we need to cascade.

Any ideas?
